PRRMetadataEntry.description: String metadata key/value attached to a peer registry entry.

MULTIFORMAT_ADDRESS.description: Known libp2p/IPFS multiaddresses for this peer.

TRUST_LEVEL.description: Trust level assigned to this peer by the local registry.

GROUPS.description: Peer group names this peer belongs to.

ADDED_AT.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when this peer was added.

LAST_SEEN.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when this peer was last observed.

LAST_CONNECTED.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when this peer last connected.

CONNECTION_COUNT.description: Number of successful connections observed by this node.

MESSAGES_RECEIVED.description: Number of messages received from this peer.

MESSAGES_SENT.description: Number of messages sent to this peer.

BYTES_RECEIVED.description: Number of bytes received from this peer.

BYTES_SENT.description: Number of bytes sent to this peer.

EPM_DATA.description: Optional EPM.fbs bytes for the peer identity profile.

VCARD_DATA.description: Optional vCard projection for compatibility views.

METADATA.description: Additional peer metadata as string key/value entries.

UPDATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when this registry record was last updated.

DELETED.description: True when this record tombstones the peer from the current registry.

PROVIDER_PEER_ID.description: Peer ID of the node/provider that issued this registry record.

PROVIDER_SIGNATURE.description: Provider signature over the peer registry record.
